text: The persistent hissing unsettles me, like an unseen presence humming in the background of my awareness. Entering this bright, carefully curated space, I feel the duality of observation and concealment—am I witnessing, or am I being watched? Fluorescent lights and the symmetry of design sharpen my sense of isolation while also inviting reflection on visibility and hiddenness. I feel uneasy, yet strangely alert, as though something important lingers beneath the ordinary.
